lines.text: The signal chose you. I'm just along for the descent.
Twenty floors down. Statistically, you won't see most of them.
Floor zero. We start where the VEIN can still pretend to be gentle.
First descent. I'll narrate. You bleed. Division of labour.
You're awake. The walls noticed before I did.
This is the shallow end. Learn to move before something teaches you the hard way.
New floor. New ways for the VEIN to rearrange you.
Deeper. The pressure is starting to like you.
Floor one proper. The tutorial's over — nobody's holding the doors now.
Smell that? That's the shallows deciding what to do with us.
Onward, then. Down is the only direction the VEIN respects.
They've noticed us. How thrilling.
Try not to die in front of me. It's awkward.
Your first real fight. Tap an enemy in reach and commit. I'll watch.
Action points are finite. Spend them like you mean it.
Something's hungry. Predictable, down here.
One less thing breathing down here.
Efficient. I almost felt something.
First blood. The VEIN logs everything, you know.
Messy. I respect the conviction.
Dead. Loot what's left — it doesn't need it anymore.
That looked like it hurt. Good data.
Bleed faster, we don't have all day.
You're hurt. There's a patch in your kit — use it before you're a stain.
Integrity dropping. I'd panic, but that's your job.
The VEIN tastes blood. It always wants more.
Room's quiet now. Savor it.
Clear. Check the corners — the VEIN leaves gifts for the patient.
Nothing left standing. Tidy.
Silence. Enjoy it while the floor pretends to be empty.
This one has a name. That's never good.
The warden of this floor. It's been waiting longer than you've been alive.
Big one. Use everything — heroics are for the second attempt.
Oh, I like this one. Try to last past the first exchange.
The warden falls. The VEIN will simply grow another.
Down. You're either talented or lucky — I'll find out which.
Floor's guardian, dismantled. Don't let it go to your head.
A name, erased. The descent thanks you for the vacancy.
Floor cleared. The descent continues whether you want it to or not.
One floor survived. Nineteen rumours to go.
The way down opens. It always does, for the ones it wants.
Tutorial's behind you. From here the VEIN stops being polite.
And that's the end of you. I'll remember the seed, at least.
Reabsorbed. Don't take it personally — the VEIN takes everyone.
Dead on the shallow floors. That's almost impressive, in reverse.
Gone. The interesting part is what grows back.
Lights out. Run again — the VEIN's patient, and so am I.
The walls are listening. They always are.
Keep moving.
Every step down is a choice the VEIN made for you.
I've watched a thousand of you. You're doing fine. Mostly.
You're back. The VEIN kept your shape warm while you were gone.
Recalibrating. Same organism, same descent. The floor hasn't moved.
I held your place. The dark below is exactly as patient as advertised.
Your strands settled while you rested. They remember where you stopped.
Signal restored. Inventory intact, integrity unchanged, descent pending.
